prompt: Full 6-Activity Phase Anatomy for Review: review-auditor agent produces 3 review files, separate quality-gate-validator, human review, traceability-analyst + knowledge-curator on approval.
assertions: 5-category scoring: hallucination, security, quality, logic, performance
Every implementation file appears in review report
Every package/API verified in hallucination report
STRIDE mitigations from design verified in code
Issues have file:line locations and fix recommendations
Code checked against approved design patterns
